name: Why is Google Assistant not using my website as the answer?
description: Usually Google sees another source as clearer or more trustworthy. Improve answer clarity, page speed, schema, and consistency across your business listings.

mainEntity.name: Why is Google Assistant not using my website as the answer?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your answers are not showing up, the usual issue is that Google cannot clearly identify a better source than a competitor’s page or listing. Tighten your answer format, improve page speed, add schema, and verify that your business details are consistent everywhere.
acceptedAnswer.description: Usually Google sees another source as clearer or more trustworthy. Improve answer clarity, page speed, schema, and consistency across your business listings.
